root_text.an5.115:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.115:1.3: Āvāsamaccharinī hoti, kulamaccharinī hoti, lābhamaccharinī hoti, vaṇṇamaccharinī hoti, dhammamaccharinī hoti.
root_text.an5.115:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.115:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.115:2.3: Na āvāsamaccharinī hoti, na kulamaccharinī hoti, na lābhamaccharinī hoti, na vaṇṇamaccharinī hoti, na dhammamaccharinī hoti.
root_text.an5.115:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.115:1.1: “Mendicants, a nun with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.115:1.3: She is stingy with dwellings, families, material things, praise, and the teaching.
translation_text.an5.115:1.4: A nun with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.115:2.1: A nun with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.115:2.3: She is not stingy with dwellings, families, material things, praise, or the teaching.
translation_text.an5.115:2.4: A nun with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
